nameMeanings.name: Avenel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Avenell
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Avenel, a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Avo. The surname was later confused with Averill .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Avenel was born about 1080, in Normandy, France, his father, Osmelline de Avenel, was 32 and his mother, Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels, was 45. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Avice de Avenel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Avenel est né environ 1080, à Normandie, France, son père, Osmelline de Avenel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Avice de Avenel.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Avenel um 1080 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osmelline de Avenel 32 und seine Mutter Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels 45. Er hatte mit Avice de Avenel mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Avenel è nato il circa 1080 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Osmelline de Avenel, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Avice de Avenel.

ja.lifeSummary: William Avenelが約1080年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Osmelline de Avenelは32歳，母Emme FitzGilbert  de Moelsは45歳であった。彼はAvice de Avenelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: William Avenel(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osmelline de Avenel(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Avice de Avenel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Avenel nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Osmelline de Avenel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Avice de Avenel.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Avenel родился около 1080 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Osmelline de Avenel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels, 45. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Avice de Avenel.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Avenel nació aproximadamente 1080, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Osmelline de Avenel, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Emme FitzGilbert  de Moels, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Avice de Avenel.
